meaning: adj.排泄物的,渣滓的,糟粕的
examples: The ancient fecal material, or coprolite, was littered with seared prickly pear seeds and flecked with small bones from fish, birds, and rodents.
The water is filthy with fecal matter.
Also found on money: staphylococcus bacteria and fecal matter.
Laboratory tests of water samples in New Orleans found it loaded with fecal material.
In fact, this is already being attempted, with probiotic supplements and, in more extreme cases, fecal transplants.
